title: lipocarpha atra var. barteri
intro: Lipocarpha atra var. barteri is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as a type of sedge. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of Lipocarpha atra var. barteri include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Lipocarpha atra var. barteri can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine as a paste or ointment, although its uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and cultural context.
